tag.v: Operates only during the annual EAA fly-in
Originally located in Mauston, Wisconsin. Moved to Lone Rock, Wisconsin circa 1928. Relocated to Pioneer Airport circa 1985.
EAA Membership and Museum Admission Required
City of Oshkosh has annexed significant area since data import, needs update
May,Sep,Oct Sa-Su 10:30-16:00; May Mo[-1]-Sep Mo[1] 10:30-16:00; Jul Su[-1] -6 days-Jul Su[-1] closed
May,Sep,Oct Sa-Su 10:30-16:00; May Mo[-1]-Sep Mo[1] 10:30-16:00; Jul Su[-1] -6 days-Jul Su[-1] closed
May,Sep,Oct Sa-Su 10:30-16:00; May Mo[-1]-Sep Mo[1] 10:30-16:00; Jul Su[-1] -6 days-Jul Su[-1] closed
Some of the boundaries between Wittman and Pioneer/EAA weren't very clear, so they may need to be fixed there.
EAA Membership and/or Museum Admission Required
